arts.ttl: Plymouth to host Liverpool in FA Cup fourth round
arts.sum: Championship side Plymouth Argyle are drawn at home to eight-time winners Liverpool in the FA Cup fourth round.

arts.ttl: What can Plymouth Argyle fans expect from new head coach Miron Muslic?
arts.sum: When a side sacks a manager while they are in the relegation zone, it is usually met by approval from the fanbase. For Cercle Brugge a few weeks ago, this…

arts.ttl: 2024/25 FA Cup fourth round draw: Man Utd draw Leicester; Liverpool face Plymouth
arts.sum: The 16 fourth-round fixtures are set to be dotted across the weekend of Saturday, 8 February . Nevertheless, FA Cup referees won't be able to call upon the backing of VAR for the fourth round.

arts.ttl: Player signs for promotion-chasing club just days after Plymouth Argyle release
arts.sum: Turkish side Fatih Karagumruk have confirmed the signing of Andre Gray just days after the forward was released by Plymouth Argyle. The former Burnley and QPR man spent three months this season with the Championship side, but will now be playing in the Turkish second tier. arts.ttl: U’s likely to appeal red card shown to Tyler Goodrham in FA Cup exit
arts.sum: OXFORD United are likely to appeal the straight red card shown to Tyler Goodrham in the closing stages of the Emirates FA Cup defeat to Exeter City.
